generated_oml:
instance AirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based sensor for indoor air quality monitoring"
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing position data from gantry crane controllers"
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing velocity data from gantry crane controllers"
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualitySensor
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gantry crane position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gantry crane velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion simulation of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Core programming language for implementing digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technology for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinDeploymentService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization dashboard tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data streaming between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging of operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data visualization for system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal trajectory generation for puck movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation against physical system's behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemValidationInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying digital twin components via containerization"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data insights for operational analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system monitoring insights"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory action for puck movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation insights against physical system behavior"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and educational purposes"
    base:contains GantryCraneSystem
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system consisting of physical crane and controller components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service generates optimal movement trajectories using a kinematic model of the crane, which are processed by the Control Application. The Control Application uses the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to send command signals (e.g., trajectory instructions) to the physical crane's controllers. Validation occurs via the Continuous Validation Service comparing simulated and executed trajectories, though command message formats and authentication mechanisms are not specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system's architecture is structured using the C4 Model, with context and container diagrams defining component interactions and system organization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation is performed by comparing executed trajectory measurements against simulations using Euclidean distance metrics; discrepancies exceeding threshold values trigger error correction processes to maintain model fidelity and system accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "All components run on a single personal computer interconnected via an MQTT-based network topology using Eclipse Mosquitto as the broker for inter-service communication (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service). The physical crane is connected directly to the computer via a hardware interface (e.g., USB/serial), though specifics are not detailed. Bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on-premise on a single personal computer with TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker, and Grafana Dashboard containerized using Docker via a docker-compose file. Other components (Control Application, Logging Application) run as Python applications on the host machine. Scalability and redundancy mechanisms are not detailed, but the deployment supports single-node execution with containerized services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab-Scale Gantry Crane follows an ad-hoc approach without adherence to specific industry standards or frameworks, utilizing containerization for deployment but not following formal standardization protocols."
]
